name: Fast Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the garlic.
2. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until tender.
3. Stir in tomatoes and beans. Pour in water and add the grain (rice, quinoa, or couscous).
4. Season with herbs and spices to taste.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the grain is cooked through.
6. Serve with tossed salad.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE (I would cut back on the beans to make it count as 1 starch/bread) (I also would use a combination of couscous & quinoa and even add any free vegetables. This would be great to make ahead and take to work in the summer time.)
